text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the weekend, so I head over to the mall for some shopping...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's not right, not right at all! It needs to be more like, "Earth!
Wind! Sun!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A familiar voice reverberates throughout the mall. I start walking
towards the direction it's coming from.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I told you—I want lighter shoes that can turn on a dime, like,
ka-woosh!

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text: K-ka-woosh? Well then... how about this pair of shoes?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Close! I need something tougher-looking that'll absorb the
force of my every step...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ugh, how should I put it? Sigh... If only Trainer were around at times like these—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! Th-that voice... Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like El's out shoe shopping, but can't find the right words to
describe her dream shoe to the store clerk.
choice_data_list:
So you're looking for a pair of shoes that suits
you?

So you're looking for a pair of shoes that suits
you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! Right, but I can't put it into words. My head gets all jumbled
and mixed up.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer, you know what kind of shoe I want, right? I mean, you're
my trainer, after all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Which means you'll explain to the store clerk for me, right? C'mon, we're the dynamic duo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gracias! I'm gracious! I'm grateful! I'm jubilant, even! I've got nothin'
to fear when Trainer's here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The shoes I want are as light as wind, turn on a dime, and feel like the
warm embrace of the earth... They're shoes full of passion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going off of El's description, I consult the clerk to see if they have
any bright-colored shoes with good grip, cushioning, and
breathability.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nice goin', Trainer! These shoes fit my tastes to the T!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I knew it—our hearts are connected. Unbreakable bonds! Unwavering
trust! Mutual understanding!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That was like one of the team plays Mama and I used to come up
with... Right, this one time I went present shopping with Mama—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I almost forgot! Trainer! There's one more place I wanna check
out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, El proceeds to bring me into a fast-food joint.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mmm, so many juicy smells... Wow, they all look so good!
choice_data_list: You want me to help you order this time?
You want me to help you order this time?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not this time! Trainer, you just wait here for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, El queues up to have her order taken.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Behold—my triumphant return!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El fills the table with all of the food she's just bought. But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Is that crimson flame blood or batter?! No, the fry itself is ablaze!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spice is life! And the essence of life is boiling red blood! Red,
hot—spicy! Here's your serving of El's special fries!
choice_data_list: I think I heard you say something scary there...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. Trainer, aren't you curious? Surely you're curious to the true
nature of these red fries!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then let me indulge your curiosity! Behold, for this is the secret sauce
of my kin!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They finally sent me a bottle yesterday, so I used up the whole bottle
on this food—down to the last drop!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, it tastes great! Papa's good with spicy food, but even he
jumps out of his chair when he gets a lick of this sauce.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, Trainer! Don't be shy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I might never recover if I eat this now. Maybe I should politely turn El
down—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, you're the first person I've ever let try this sauce.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Mama always told me, "Only use this sauce when you're eating with
family."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: "It's too dangerous for those without the tolerance to handle it."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! I can only serve this sauce to those I've opened my heart up to!
That's how precious it is!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And Trainer, you're special!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
After all, you're my partner! We're tight as family, so of course you
can try it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. This sauce is full of my love. Consider this thanks for your hard
work in training me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's divide this between the two of us and make this a feast to
remember! C'mon Trainer, don't be shy now...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, let's dig in! Haha, the food won't be goin' anywhere, so feel free
to savor the flavor!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So... how is it? Are the flames of passion welling up within your body
yet?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I steel myself for a fiery impact, but it really isn't that bad. The spicy
seasoning is actually quite pleas—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I see it was so tasty that you're jumping for joy! I'm happy you
like it, I really am!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you want, you can have my portion too! Eat as much as you want!
This is my gift to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't feel my tongue anymore, but I do feel some sort of power
surging through my body... I think.
